returns.token0Bal: The amount of token0 in the strategy.
returns.token1Bal: The amount of token1 in the strategy.

returns.altAmount0: The amount of token0 in the alt position.
returns.altAmount1: The amount of token1 in the alt position.
returns.mainAmount0: The amount of token0 in the main position.
returns.mainAmount1: The amount of token1 in the main position.
returns.token0Bal: The amount of token0 in the pool.
returns.token1Bal: The amount of token1 in the pool.

returns.token0Bal: The amount of token0 in the strategy.
returns.token1Bal: The amount of token1 in the strategy.

returns.tick: The current tick of the pool.

harvest().details: Call fee goes to the tx.origin.

params._callFeeRecipient: The address to send the call fee to.

initialize(address,address,address,addre.details: Make sure cardinality is set appropriately for the twap.

params._commonAddresses: The common addresses needed for the strat fee manager.
params._output: The output token for the strategy.
params._paths: The bytes paths for swapping (Output To Native, Token0 to Native, Token1 to Native).
params._positionWidth: The multiplier for tick spacing to find our range.

returns._0: address[] The route to swap the output to the native token.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params._minAmount0: The minimum amount of token0 in the strategy after panic.
params._minAmount1: The minimum amount of token1 in the strategy after panic.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

returns._price: The current price of the pool.

returns.lowerPrice: The lower price of the position.
returns.upperPrice: The upper price of the position.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._maxDeviation: The max deviation from twap we will allow.

params._width: The new width multiplier of the position.

returns.sqrtPriceX96: The sqrt price of the pool.

returns.fee: The swap fee of the underlying pool

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

returns.twapTick: The twap of the last minute from the pool.

params._amount0: The amount of token0 to withdraw.
params._amount1: The amount of token1 to withdraw.

balances().notice: Returns total token balances in the strategy.

balancesOfPool().notice: Returns total tokens in pool positions (is a calculation which means it could be a little off by a few wei).

balancesOfThis().notice: Returns total tokens sitting in the strategy.

beefyFeeConfig().notice: The address of the beefy fee config, set on the factory.

beefyFeeRecipient().notice: The address of the beefy fee recipient, set on the factory.

beforeAction().notice: Called during deposit and withdraw to remove liquidity and harvest fees for accounting purposes.

currentTick().notice: The current tick of the pool.

deposit().notice: Called during deposit to add all liquidity back to their positions.

depositFee().notice: The deposit fee variable will alwasy be 0. This is used by the UI.

factory().notice: The address of the strategy factory

fees().notice: The amount of unharvested output in the strategy.

getAllFees().notice: get all the fees from the fee config for this contract

getStratFeeId().notice: get the strat fee id from the fee config

harvest().notice: Harvest call to claim rewards from gauge then charge fees for Beefy and notify rewards.

harvest(address).notice: Harvest call to claim rewards from gauge then charge fees for Beefy and notify rewards.

initialize(address,address,address,addre.notice: Initializes the strategy and the inherited strat fee manager.

isCalm().notice: function to only allow deposit/setTick actions when current price is within a certain deviation of twap.

keeper().notice: The address of the keeper, set on the factory.

lastHarvest().notice: The last time the strat harvested

lastPositionAdjustment().notice: The last time we adjusted the position

lockedProfit().notice: The locked profit is the amount of token0 and token1 that is locked in the vault, this can be overriden by the strategy contract.

lpToken0().notice: The address of the first token in the liquidity pool.

lpToken0ToNativePath().notice: The path to swap the first token to the native token for data pricing.

lpToken0ToNativePrice().notice: Returns the price of the first token in native token.

lpToken1().notice: The address of the second token in the liquidity pool.

lpToken1ToNativePath().notice: The path to swap the second token to the native token for data pricing.

lpToken1ToNativePrice().notice: Returns the price of the second token in native token.

maxTickDeviation().notice: the max tick deviations we will allow for deposits/setTick.

moveTicks().notice: Function called to rebalance the position

native().notice: The native address of the chain

nftManager().notice: The address of the NFT position manager.

outputToNative().notice: Returns the route to swap the output token to the native token for fee harvesting.

outputToNativePath().notice: The path to swap the output to the native token for fee harvesting.

panic(uint256,uint256).notice: Remove Liquidity and Allowances, then pause deposits.

pool().notice: The address of the Velodrome pool.

positionAlt().notice: The alternative position of the strategy.

positionMain().notice: The main position of the strategy.

positionWidth().notice: The width of the position, thats a multiplier for tick spacing to find our range.

price().notice: The current price of the pool.

range().notice: Returns the range of the pool, will always be the main position.

retireVault().notice: Retire the strategy and return all the dust to the fee recipient.

setDeviation(int56).notice: Sets the deviation from the twap we will allow on adding liquidity.

setPositionWidth(int24).notice: Sets our position width and readjusts our positions.

setStratFeeId(uint256).notice: set the strat fee id in the fee config

sqrtPrice().notice: The sqrt price of the pool.

swapFee().notice: The swap fee variable is the fee charged for swaps in the underlying pool in 18 decimals

totalLocked0().notice: The total amount of token0 locked in the vault

totalLocked1().notice: The total amount of token1 locked in the vault

twap().notice: The twap of the last minute from the pool.

twapInterval().notice: The twap interval seconds we use for the twap check.

unpause().notice: Unpause deposits, give allowances and add liquidity.

withdraw(uint256,uint256).notice: Withdraws the specified amount of tokens from the strategy as calculated by the vault.

withdrawFee().notice: The withdraw fee variable will alwasy be 0. This is used by the UI.
